name: Dak's Corn-Cheddar Cheese-Oat Bran Bread (Bread Machine)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Durkee Canned French Fried Onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Set machines browning control to light.
2. Put all ingredients into the bread machine pan in the order listed.
3. Select "Oat/French" setting and push "Start."
